Microsoft Power Apps documentation

Build low-code apps that modernize processes and solve business challenges.

Sections:
- Create and design
  - Try/Buy Power Apps
  - Create apps: Choose app type, Plan designer, Canvas apps, Model-driven apps, Code apps
  - AI copilot capabilities: Plan designer, New experience (preview), Build apps through conversation, Add Copilot control (preview)
  - Create and manage data: Microsoft Dataverse, Tables and metadata, Business logic, Dataflows
  - Use solutions: Solutions overview, ALM, Pipelines
  - Integrate: Power BI, Azure Synapse Link, Teams
  - Best practices: Coding guidelines, Collaborate and co-develop

- Administer and extend
  - Power Platform admin center
  - Licensing
  - Security and governance
  - Dataverse developer guide
  - Model-driven apps developer guide
  - Canvas apps developer guide

- Use
  - Mobile devices
  - Web browsers
  - Teams

Updated: 2026-03-24
